# This is the CMakeCache file.
# For build in directory: /work/tmp/work/corstone1000_fvp-poky-linux-musl/trusted-firmware-m/1.6.0-r0/build
# It was generated by CMake: /work/tmp/work/corstone1000_fvp-poky-linux-musl/trusted-firmware-m/1.6.0-r0/recipe-sysroot-native/usr/bin/cmake
# You can edit this file to change values found and used by cmake.
# If you do not want to change any of the values, simply exit the editor.
# If you do want to change a value, simply edit, save, and exit the editor.
# The syntax for the file is as follows:
# KEY:TYPE=VALUE
# KEY is the name of a variable in the cache.
# TYPE is a hint to GUIs for the type of VALUE, DO NOT EDIT TYPE!.
# VALUE is the current value for the KEY.

########################
# EXTERNAL cache entries
########################

//Include COSE key-id in initial attestation token
ATTEST_INCLUDE_COSE_KEY_ID:BOOL=OFF

//Include optional claims in initial attestation token
ATTEST_INCLUDE_OPTIONAL_CLAIMS:BOOL=ON

//Whether to build BL1
BL1:BOOL=ON

//Value Computed by CMake
BL1 Bootloader_BINARY_DIR:STATIC=/work/tmp/work/corstone1000_fvp-poky-linux-musl/trusted-firmware-m/1.6.0-r0/build/platform/target/bl1

//Value Computed by CMake
BL1 Bootloader_IS_TOP_LEVEL:STATIC=OFF

//Value Computed by CMake
BL1 Bootloader_SOURCE_DIR:STATIC=/work/tmp/work/corstone1000_fvp-poky-linux-musl/trusted-firmware-m/1.6.0-r0/git/tfm/platform/ext/target/arm/corstone1000/bl1

//BL1 Header size
BL1_HEADER_SIZE:STRING=0x000

//BL1 Trailer size
BL1_TRAILER_SIZE:STRING=0x000

//Whether to build BL2
BL2:BOOL=ON

//Header size
BL2_HEADER_SIZE:STRING=0x400

//Trailer size
BL2_TRAILER_SIZE:STRING=0x800

//Value Computed by CMake
Bootloader_BINARY_DIR:STATIC=/work/tmp/work/corstone1000_fvp-poky-linux-musl/trusted-firmware-m/1.6.0-r0/build/bl2

//Value Computed by CMake

//Value Computed by CMake

//A wrapper around 'ar' adding the appropriate '--plugin' option
// for the GCC compiler
CMAKE_ASM_COMPILER_AR:FILEPATH=/work/tmp/work/corstone1000_fvp-poky-linux-musl/trusted-firmware-m/1.6.0-r0/recipe-sysroot-native/usr/bin/arm-none-eabi-gcc-ar

//Flags used by the ASM compiler during DEBUG builds.
CMAKE_ASM_FLAGS_DEBUG:STRING=-g

//Flags used by the ASM compiler during MINSIZEREL builds.
CMAKE_ASM_FLAGS_MINSIZEREL:STRING=-Os -DNDEBUG

//Flags used by the ASM compiler during RELEASE builds.
CMAKE_ASM_FLAGS_RELEASE:STRING=-O3 -DNDEBUG

//Flags used by the ASM compiler during RELWITHDEBINFO builds.
CMAKE_ASM_FLAGS_RELWITHDEBINFO:STRING=-O2 -g -DNDEBUG

CMAKE_BUILD_TYPE:STRING=Debug

//No help, variable specified on the command line.
CMAKE_VERBOSE_MAKEFILE:BOOL=ON

//Disable build logs
CONFIG_TFM_BUILD_LOG_QUIET:BOOL=OFF

//The maximal number of secure services that are connected or requested
// at the same time
CONFIG_TFM_CONN_HANDLE_MAX_NUM:STRING=8

//Enable the doorbell APIs
CONFIG_TFM_DOORBELL_API:BOOL=ON

//FP ABI type in SPE and NSPE: soft-Software ABI, hard-Hardware
// ABI
CONFIG_TFM_FP:STRING=soft

//On fatal errors in the secure firmware, halt instead of rebooting.
CONFIG_TFM_HALT_ON_CORE_PANIC:BOOL=ON

//Enable/disable lazy stacking
CONFIG_TFM_LAZY_STACKING:BOOL=OFF

//Disable the memory usage report
CONFIG_TFM_MEMORY_USAGE_QUIET:BOOL=OFF

//Parse manifest quietly
CONFIG_TFM_PARSE_MANIFEST_QUIET:BOOL=OFF

//Disable printing of partition configuration during build
CONFIG_TFM_PARTITION_QUIET:BOOL=OFF

//The SPM backend [IPC, SFN]
CONFIG_TFM_SPM_BACKEND:STRING=IPC

//Cross-compilation triplet
CROSS_COMPILE:STRING=arm-none-eabi

//Disable PSA Crypto AEAD module
CRYPTO_AEAD_MODULE_DISABLED:BOOL=FALSE

//Disable PSA Crypto asymmetric key encryption module
CRYPTO_ASYM_ENCRYPT_MODULE_DISABLED:BOOL=FALSE

//Disable PSA Crypto asymmetric key signature module
CRYPTO_ASYM_SIGN_MODULE_DISABLED:BOOL=FALSE

//Disable PSA Crypto Cipher module
CRYPTO_CIPHER_MODULE_DISABLED:BOOL=FALSE

//The max number of concurrent operations that can be active (allocated)
// at any time in Crypto
CRYPTO_CONC_OPER_NUM:STRING=8

//Heap size for the crypto backend
CRYPTO_ENGINE_BUF_SIZE:STRING=0x4000

//Disable PSA Crypto Hash module
CRYPTO_HASH_MODULE_DISABLED:BOOL=FALSE

//Whether to enable the crypto hardware accelerator on supported
// platforms
CRYPTO_HW_ACCELERATOR:BOOL=ON

//Default size of the internal scratch buffer used for PSA FF IOVec
// allocations
CRYPTO_IOVEC_BUFFER_SIZE:STRING=5120

//Disable PSA Crypto key derivation module
CRYPTO_KEY_DERIVATION_MODULE_DISABLED:BOOL=FALSE

//Disable PSA Crypto Key module
CRYPTO_KEY_MODULE_DISABLED:BOOL=FALSE

//Disable PSA Crypto MAC module
CRYPTO_MAC_MODULE_DISABLED:BOOL=FALSE

//Use stored NV seed to provide entropy
CRYPTO_NV_SEED:BOOL=OFF

//Disable PSA Crypto random number generator module
CRYPTO_RNG_MODULE_DISABLED:BOOL=FALSE

//Debug authentication setting. [CHIP_DEFAULT, NONE, NS_ONLY, FULL
DEBUG_AUTHENTICATION:STRING=CHIP_DEFAULT

//Whether to use the default flash map defined by TF-M project
DEFAULT_MCUBOOT_FLASH_MAP:BOOL=OFF

//Whether to use the default security counter configuration defined
// by TF-M project
DEFAULT_MCUBOOT_SECURITY_COUNTERS:BOOL=OFF

//Dot tool for use with Doxygen
DOXYGEN_DOT_EXECUTABLE:FILEPATH=DOXYGEN_DOT_EXECUTABLE-NOTFOUND

//Doxygen documentation generation tool (http://www.doxygen.org)
DOXYGEN_EXECUTABLE:FILEPATH=DOXYGEN_EXECUTABLE-NOTFOUND

//Whether to include external system support.
EXTERNAL_SYSTEM_SUPPORT:BOOL=OFF

FETCHCONTENT_BASE_DIR:STRING=/work/tmp/work/corstone1000_fvp-poky-linux-musl/trusted-firmware-m/1.6.0-r0/build/lib/ext

//Disables all attempts to download or update content and assumes
// source dirs already exist
FETCHCONTENT_FULLY_DISCONNECTED:BOOL=ON

//Enables QUIET option for all content population
FETCHCONTENT_QUIET:BOOL=ON

//Enables UPDATE_DISCONNECTED behavior for all content population
FETCHCONTENT_UPDATES_DISCONNECTED:BOOL=OFF

//Whether to forward all PSA RoT messages to a Secure Enclave
FORWARD_PROT_MSG:BOOL=OFF

//Generate the auto-generated files as needed
GEN_FILES:BOOL=ON

//Size of the ITS internal data transfer buffer (defaults to ITS_MAX_ASSET_SIZE
// if not set)
ITS_BUF_SIZE:STRING=

//Create flash FS if it doesn't exist for Internal Trusted Storage
// partition
ITS_CREATE_FLASH_LAYOUT:BOOL=ON

//The maximum asset size to be stored in the Internal Trusted Storage
// area
ITS_MAX_ASSET_SIZE:STRING=512

//The maximum number of assets to be stored in the Internal Trusted
// Storage area
ITS_NUM_ASSETS:STRING=10

//Enable emulated RAM FS for platforms that don't have flash for
// Internal Trusted Storage partition
ITS_RAM_FS:BOOL=OFF

//Validate filesystem metadata every time it is read from flash
ITS_VALIDATE_METADATA_FROM_FLASH:BOOL=ON

//No help, variable specified on the command line.
LIBMETAL_BIN_PATH:UNINITIALIZED=/work/tmp/work/corstone1000_fvp-poky-linux-musl/trusted-firmware-m/1.6.0-r0/build/libmetal-build

//The version of libmetal to use
LIBMETAL_VERSION:STRING=f252f0e007fbfb8b3a52b1d5901250ddac96baad

//No help, variable specified on the command line.
LIBOPENAMP_BIN_PATH:UNINITIALIZED=/work/tmp/work/corstone1000_fvp-poky-linux-musl/trusted-firmware-m/1.6.0-r0/build/libopenamp-build

//Path to Libopenamp (or DOWNLOAD to fetch automatically
LIBOPENAMP_SRC_PATH:PATH=/work/tmp/work/corstone1000_fvp-poky-linux-musl/trusted-firmware-m/1.6.0-r0/git/openamp

//Explicitly link mbed TLS library to pthread.
LINK_WITH_PTHREAD:BOOL=OFF

//Explicitly link mbed TLS library to trusted_storage.
LINK_WITH_TRUSTED_STORAGE:BOOL=OFF

//Build type of Mbed Crypto library
MBEDCRYPTO_BUILD_TYPE:STRING=relwithdebinfo

//The URL (or path) to retrieve MbedTLS from.
MBEDCRYPTO_GIT_REMOTE:STRING=https://github.com/Mbed-TLS/mbedtls.git

//Path to Mbed Crypto (or DOWNLOAD to fetch automatically
MBEDCRYPTO_PATH:PATH=/work/tmp/work/corstone1000_fvp-poky-linux-musl/trusted-firmware-m/1.6.0-r0/git/mbedtls

//The version of Mbed Crypto to use
MBEDCRYPTO_VERSION:STRING=mbedtls-3.1.0

//align option for mcuboot and build image with imgtool [1, 2,
// 4, 8, 16, 32]
MCUBOOT_ALIGN_VAL:STRING=1

//Enable the revert mechanism in direct-xip mode
MCUBOOT_DIRECT_XIP_REVERT:BOOL=ON

//Use RSA for encrypted image upgrade support
MCUBOOT_ENCRYPT_RSA:BOOL=OFF

//Enable encrypted image upgrade support
MCUBOOT_ENC_IMAGES:BOOL=OFF

//Length of the AES key for encrypt NS image
MCUBOOT_ENC_KEY_LEN_NS:STRING=128

//Length of the AES key for encrypt S image
MCUBOOT_ENC_KEY_LEN_S:STRING=128

//Slot from which to execute the image, used for XIP mode
MCUBOOT_EXECUTION_SLOT:STRING=1

//Fault injection hardening profile [OFF, LOW, MEDIUM, HIGH]
MCUBOOT_FIH_PROFILE:STRING=OFF

//Whether to embed the entire public key in the image metadata
// instead of the hash only
MCUBOOT_HW_KEY:BOOL=ON

//Enable security counter validation against non-volatile HW counters
MCUBOOT_HW_ROLLBACK_PROT:BOOL=ON

//Whether to combine S and NS into either 1 image, or sign each
// separately
MCUBOOT_IMAGE_NUMBER:STRING=2

//Version number of NS image
MCUBOOT_IMAGE_VERSION_NS:STRING=0.0.0

//Version number of S image
MCUBOOT_IMAGE_VERSION_S:STRING=1.6.0

//Path to key with which to encrypt binary
MCUBOOT_KEY_ENC:FILEPATH=/work/tmp/work/corstone1000_fvp-poky-linux-musl/trusted-firmware-m/1.6.0-r0/git/mcuboot/enc-rsa2048-pub.pem

//Path to key with which to sign non-secure binary
MCUBOOT_KEY_NS:FILEPATH=/work/tmp/work/corstone1000_fvp-poky-linux-musl/trusted-firmware-m/1.6.0-r0/git/tfm/bl2/ext/mcuboot/root-RSA-3072_1.pem

//Path to key with which to sign secure binary
MCUBOOT_KEY_S:FILEPATH=/work/tmp/work/corstone1000_fvp-poky-linux-musl/trusted-firmware-m/1.6.0-r0/git/tfm/bl2/ext/mcuboot/root-RSA-3072.pem

//Level of logging to use for MCUboot [OFF, ERROR, WARNING, INFO,
// DEBUG]
MCUBOOT_LOG_LEVEL:STRING=INFO

//Mbedtls config file to use with MCUboot
MCUBOOT_MBEDCRYPTO_CONFIG_FILEPATH:FILEPATH=/work/tmp/work/corstone1000_fvp-poky-linux-musl/trusted-firmware-m/1.6.0-r0/git/tfm/bl2/ext/mcuboot/config/mcuboot-mbedtls-cfg.h

//Add boot measurement values to boot status. Used for initial
// attestation token
MCUBOOT_MEASURED_BOOT:BOOL=ON

//ID of the flash area containing the primary Non-Secure image
MCUBOOT_NS_IMAGE_FLASH_AREA_NUM:STRING=1

//Minimum version of non-secure image required by the secure image
// for upgrade to this secure image. If MCUBOOT_IMAGE_NUMBER ==
// 1 this option has no effect
MCUBOOT_NS_IMAGE_MIN_VER:STRING=0.0.0+0

//Path to MCUboot (or DOWNLOAD to fetch automatically
MCUBOOT_PATH:PATH=/work/tmp/work/corstone1000_fvp-poky-linux-musl/trusted-firmware-m/1.6.0-r0/git/mcuboot

//Security counter for NS image. auto sets it to IMAGE_VERSION_NS
MCUBOOT_SECURITY_COUNTER_NS:STRING=1

//Security counter for S image. auto sets it to IMAGE_VERSION_S
MCUBOOT_SECURITY_COUNTER_S:STRING=1

//Key length to use for signature validation
MCUBOOT_SIGNATURE_KEY_LEN:STRING=3072

//Algorithm to use for signature validation
MCUBOOT_SIGNATURE_TYPE:STRING=RSA

//ID of the flash area containing the primary Secure image
MCUBOOT_S_IMAGE_FLASH_AREA_NUM:STRING=0

//Minimum version of secure image required by the non-secure image
// for upgrade to this non-secure image. If MCUBOOT_IMAGE_NUMBER
// == 1 this option has no effect
MCUBOOT_S_IMAGE_MIN_VER:STRING=0.0.0+0

//Upgrade strategy when multiple boot images are loaded
MCUBOOT_UPGRADE_STRATEGY:STRING=RAM_LOAD

//The version of MCUboot to use
MCUBOOT_VERSION:STRING=v1.9.0

//Whether to build NS app
NS:BOOL=FALSE

//Number of mailbox queue slots
NUM_MAILBOX_QUEUE_SLOT:BOOL=1

//The version of openamp to use
OPENAMP_VERSION:STRING=347397decaa43372fc4d00f965640ebde042966d

//Enable OTP/NV_COUNTERS emulation in RAM. Has no effect on non-default
// implementations of the OTP and NV_COUNTERS
OTP_NV_COUNTERS_RAM_EMULATION:BOOL=OFF

//Path to a program.
PERL_EXECUTABLE:FILEPATH=/work/tmp/hosttools/perl

//Use default attest hal implementation.
PLATFORM_DEFAULT_ATTEST_HAL:BOOL=ON

//Whether to use default BL1 or platform-specific one
PLATFORM_DEFAULT_BL1:STRING=OFF

//Use default crypto keys implementation.
PLATFORM_DEFAULT_CRYPTO_KEYS:BOOL=ON

//Use default initial attestation_key.
PLATFORM_DEFAULT_IAK:BOOL=ON

//Use default nv counter implementation.
PLATFORM_DEFAULT_NV_COUNTERS:BOOL=ON

//Use default NV seed implementation.
PLATFORM_DEFAULT_NV_SEED:BOOL=ON

//Use trusted on-chip flash to implement OTP memory
PLATFORM_DEFAULT_OTP:BOOL=TRUE

//Use OTP memory with write support
PLATFORM_DEFAULT_OTP_WRITEABLE:BOOL=ON

//Use default provisioning implementation
PLATFORM_DEFAULT_PROVISIONING:BOOL=ON

//Use default root of trust public key.
PLATFORM_DEFAULT_ROTPK:BOOL=ON

//Use default uart stdout implementation.
PLATFORM_DEFAULT_UART_STDOUT:BOOL=ON

//Whether to enable FVP or FPGA build of the platform.
PLATFORM_IS_FVP:BOOL=TRUE

//Whether to use psa-adac secure debug.
PLATFORM_PSA_ADAC_SECURE_DEBUG:BOOL=FALSE

//Path to source dir of psa-adac.
PLATFORM_PSA_ADAC_SOURCE_PATH:PATH=DOWNLOAD

//The version of psa-adac to use.
PLATFORM_PSA_ADAC_VERSION:STRING=427923cc0152578d536fb2065154d5d0dd874910

//Size of input buffer in platform service.
PLATFORM_SERVICE_INPUT_BUFFER_SIZE:STRING=64

//Size of output buffer in platform service.
PLATFORM_SERVICE_OUTPUT_BUFFER_SIZE:STRING=256

PROJECT_EC_FLAGS:STRING=-Wall -Werror -Wextra

//Path to PSA arch tests (or DOWNLOAD to fetch automatically
PSA_ARCH_TESTS_PATH:PATH=DOWNLOAD

//The version of PSA arch tests to use
PSA_ARCH_TESTS_VERSION:STRING=f7e8495

//Enable MM-IOVEC
PSA_FRAMEWORK_HAS_MM_IOVEC:BOOL=OFF

//The maximum permitted size for block in psa_fwu_write, in bytes.
PSA_FWU_MAX_BLOCK_SIZE:STRING=1024

//Create flash FS if it doesn't exist for Protected Storage partition
PS_CREATE_FLASH_LAYOUT:BOOL=ON

//The AEAD algorithm to use for authenticated encryption in Protected
// Storage
PS_CRYPTO_AEAD_ALG:STRING=PSA_ALG_GCM

//Enable encryption for Protected Storage partition
PS_ENCRYPTION:BOOL=OFF

//The maximum asset size to be stored in the Protected Storage
// area
PS_MAX_ASSET_SIZE:STRING=2048

//The maximum number of assets to be stored in the Protected Storage
// area
PS_NUM_ASSETS:STRING=40

//Enable emulated RAM FS for platforms that don't have flash for
// Protected Storage partition
PS_RAM_FS:BOOL=OFF

//Enable rollback protection for Protected Storage partition
PS_ROLLBACK_PROTECTION:BOOL=OFF

//Validate filesystem metadata every time it is read from flash
PS_VALIDATE_METADATA_FROM_FLASH:BOOL=ON

//Enable secure UART1
SECURE_UART1:BOOL=OFF

//Use symmetric crypto for inital attestation
SYMMETRIC_INITIAL_ATTESTATION:BOOL=OFF

//Whether to build BL1_1 tests
TEST_BL1_1:BOOL=OFF

//Whether to build BL1_2 tests
TEST_BL1_2:BOOL=OFF

//Whether to build bl2 tests
TEST_BL2:BOOL=OFF

//Whether to build NS regression tests
TEST_NS:BOOL=OFF

//Which (if any) of the PSA API tests should be compiled
TEST_PSA_API:STRING=

//Whether to build S regression tests
TEST_S:BOOL=OFF

//Whether to build the binary for lcov tools
TFM_CODE_COVERAGE:BOOL=OFF

//Enable code sharing between MCUboot and secure firmware
TFM_CODE_SHARING:PATH=OFF

//Test CFB cryptography mode
TFM_CRYPTO_TEST_ALG_CFB:BOOL=OFF

//Add debug symbols. Note that setting CMAKE_BUILD_TYPE to Debug
// or RelWithDebInfo will also add debug symbols.
TFM_DEBUG_SYMBOLS:BOOL=ON

//Provision with dummy values. NOT to be used in production
TFM_DUMMY_PROVISIONING:BOOL=ON

//On fatal errors in the secure firmware, capture info about the
// exception. Print the info if the SPM log level is sufficient.
TFM_EXCEPTION_INFO_DUMP:BOOL=OFF

//Path to extra cmake config file
TFM_EXTRA_CONFIG_PATH:PATH=

//Path to extra generated file list. Appended to stardard TFM generated
// file list.
TFM_EXTRA_GENERATED_FILE_LIST_PATH:PATH=

//Extra manifest list file(s), used to list extra Secure Partition
// manifests.
TFM_EXTRA_MANIFEST_LIST_FILES:FILEPATH=

//List of extra Secure Partitions directories. An extra Secure
// Parition folder contains source code, CMakeLists.txt and manifest
// files
TFM_EXTRA_PARTITION_PATHS:PATH=

//Fault injection hardening profile [OFF, LOW, MEDIUM, HIGH]
TFM_FIH_PROFILE:STRING=OFF

//Bootloader configure file for Firmware Update partition
TFM_FWU_BOOTLOADER_LIB:STRING=mcuboot

//Size of the FWU internal data transfer buffer (defaults to PSA_FWU_MAX_BLOCK_SIZE
// if not set)
TFM_FWU_BUF_SIZE:STRING=

//Path to which to install TF-M files
TFM_INSTALL_PATH:PATH=/work/tmp/work/corstone1000_fvp-poky-linux-musl/trusted-firmware-m/1.6.0-r0/build/install

//Isolation level
TFM_ISOLATION_LEVEL:STRING=2

//Use secure library model instead of PSA API (IPC model)
TFM_LIB_MODEL:BOOL=OFF

//TF-M native Secure Partition manifests list file
TFM_MANIFEST_LIST:FILEPATH=/work/tmp/work/corstone1000_fvp-poky-linux-musl/trusted-firmware-m/1.6.0-r0/git/tfm/tools/tfm_manifest_list.yaml

//Config to use for Mbed Crypto. For increased flexibility when
// pointing to a file, set the type of this setting to 'STRING'
// by passing the :<type> portion when specifying the setting value
// in the command line. E.g. '-DTFM_MBEDCRYPTO_CONFIG_PATH:STRING=some_file_which_is_generated.h'
// This can be useful if the config file is generated and placed
// inside a directory already added to the include path of mbedtls.
TFM_MBEDCRYPTO_CONFIG_PATH:PATH=/work/tmp/work/corstone1000_fvp-poky-linux-musl/trusted-firmware-m/1.6.0-r0/git/tfm/lib/ext/mbedcrypto/mbedcrypto_config/tfm_mbedcrypto_config_default.h

//Config to append to standard Mbed Crypto config, used by platforms
// to cnfigure feature support
TFM_MBEDCRYPTO_PLATFORM_EXTRA_CONFIG_PATH:PATH=

//Whether to build for a dual-cpu architecture
TFM_MULTI_CORE_TOPOLOGY:BOOL=ON

//Support NSPE OS providing NSPE client_id
TFM_NS_MANAGE_NSID:BOOL=OFF

//Enable Audit Log partition
TFM_PARTITION_AUDIT_LOG:BOOL=OFF

//Enable Crypto partition
TFM_PARTITION_CRYPTO:BOOL=ON

//Enable firmware update partition
TFM_PARTITION_FIRMWARE_UPDATE:BOOL=OFF

//Enable Initial Attestation partition
TFM_PARTITION_INITIAL_ATTESTATION:BOOL=ON

//Enable Internal Trusted Storage partition
TFM_PARTITION_INTERNAL_TRUSTED_STORAGE:BOOL=ON

//Set debug SP log level as Debug level
TFM_PARTITION_LOG_LEVEL:STRING=TFM_PARTITION_LOG_LEVEL_DEBUG

//Enable Platform partition
TFM_PARTITION_PLATFORM:BOOL=ON

//Enable Protected Storage partition
TFM_PARTITION_PROTECTED_STORAGE:BOOL=ON

//Enable PSA Proxy partition
TFM_PARTITION_PSA_PROXY:BOOL=OFF

//Platform to build TF-M for. Must be either a relative path from
// [TF-M]/platform/ext/target, or an absolute path.
TFM_PLATFORM:STRING=arm/corstone1000

//Whether to use a platform specific inter core communication instead
// of mailbox in dual-cpu topology
TFM_PLAT_SPECIFIC_MULTI_CORE_COMM:BOOL=ON

//Profile to use
TFM_PROFILE:STRING=

//Use PSA API instead of secure library model
TFM_PSA_API:BOOL=ON

//Use Privileged execute never (PXN)
TFM_PXN_ENABLE:BOOL=OFF

//Set debug SPM log level as Debug level
TFM_SPM_LOG_LEVEL:STRING=TFM_SPM_LOG_LEVEL_DEBUG

//No help, variable specified on the command line.
TFM_TEST_REPO_PATH:UNINITIALIZED=/work/tmp/work/corstone1000_fvp-poky-linux-musl/trusted-firmware-m/1.6.0-r0/git/tfm/../tf-m-tests

//Path to TFM compiler toolchain file
TFM_TOOLCHAIN_FILE:FILEPATH=/work/tmp/work/corstone1000_fvp-poky-linux-musl/trusted-firmware-m/1.6.0-r0/git/tfm/toolchain_GNUARM.cmake

//Value Computed by CMake
Trusted Firmware M_BINARY_DIR:STATIC=/work/tmp/work/corstone1000_fvp-poky-linux-musl/trusted-firmware-m/1.6.0-r0/build

//Value Computed by CMake
Trusted Firmware M_IS_TOP_LEVEL:STATIC=ON

//Value Computed by CMake
Trusted Firmware M_SOURCE_DIR:STATIC=/work/tmp/work/corstone1000_fvp-poky-linux-musl/trusted-firmware-m/1.6.0-r0/git/tfm

//Allow unsafe builds. These builds ARE NOT SECURE.
UNSAFE_BUILD:BOOL=OFF

//Build mbed TLS shared library.
USE_SHARED_MBEDTLS_LIBRARY:BOOL=OFF

//Build mbed TLS static library.
USE_STATIC_MBEDTLS_LIBRARY:BOOL=ON

//Build with sample applicaitons
WITH_APPS:BOOL=OFF

//Build with default logger
WITH_DEFAULT_LOGGER:BOOL=ON

//Build with documentation
WITH_DOC:BOOL=ON

//Check Libmetal library can be found
WITH_LIBMETAL_FIND:BOOL=ON

//Build with proxy(access device controlled by other processor)
WITH_PROXY:BOOL=ON

//Build with proxy sample applicaitons
WITH_PROXY_APPS:BOOL=OFF

//Build with a static library
WITH_STATIC_LIB:BOOL=ON

//Build with virtio master enabled
WITH_VIRTIO_MASTER:BOOL=ON

//Build with virtio slave enabled
WITH_VIRTIO_SLAVE:BOOL=ON

//Dependencies for the target
bl2_mbedcrypto_LIB_DEPENDS:STATIC=general;bl2_cc312_mbedtls_api;general;bl2_crypto_hw;

//Dependencies for the target
bl2_mbedtls_LIB_DEPENDS:STATIC=general;bl2_mbedx509;

//Dependencies for the target
bl2_mbedx509_LIB_DEPENDS:STATIC=general;bl2_mbedcrypto;

//Dependencies for the target
crypto_service_mbedcrypto_LIB_DEPENDS:STATIC=general;psa_interface;general;platform_s;general;crypto_service_cc312_psa_driver_api;general;crypto_service_crypto_hw;

//Dependencies for the target
crypto_service_mbedtls_LIB_DEPENDS:STATIC=general;crypto_service_mbedx509;

//Dependencies for the target
crypto_service_mbedx509_LIB_DEPENDS:STATIC=general;crypto_service_mbedcrypto;

//Value Computed by CMake
mbed TLS_BINARY_DIR:STATIC=/work/tmp/work/corstone1000_fvp-poky-linux-musl/trusted-firmware-m/1.6.0-r0/build/bl2/mbedcrypto

//Value Computed by CMake
mbed TLS_IS_TOP_LEVEL:STATIC=OFF

//Value Computed by CMake
mbed TLS_SOURCE_DIR:STATIC=/work/tmp/work/corstone1000_fvp-poky-linux-musl/trusted-firmware-m/1.6.0-r0/git/mbedtls

//Value Computed by CMake
metal_BINARY_DIR:STATIC=/work/tmp/work/corstone1000_fvp-poky-linux-musl/trusted-firmware-m/1.6.0-r0/build/libmetal-build

//Value Computed by CMake
metal_IS_TOP_LEVEL:STATIC=OFF

//Value Computed by CMake
metal_SOURCE_DIR:STATIC=/work/tmp/work/corstone1000_fvp-poky-linux-musl/trusted-firmware-m/1.6.0-r0/git/libmetal

//Dependencies for the target
open_amp-static_LIB_DEPENDS:STATIC=general;metal-static;

//Value Computed by CMake
open_amp_BINARY_DIR:STATIC=/work/tmp/work/corstone1000_fvp-poky-linux-musl/trusted-firmware-m/1.6.0-r0/build/libopenamp-build

//Value Computed by CMake
open_amp_IS_TOP_LEVEL:STATIC=OFF

//Value Computed by CMake
open_amp_SOURCE_DIR:STATIC=/work/tmp/work/corstone1000_fvp-poky-linux-musl/trusted-firmware-m/1.6.0-r0/git/openamp
